method: fresh inspection of current codebase plus reran import/build, unit + full pytest, restamp dry-run, corpus/coverage tally, secret scan

criteria.reason: tools/axxon_mcp_auth_sessions.py imports clean; AxxonMcpAuthSessions exposes authenticate (variant Authenticate/Authenticate2/AuthenticateEx), renew_session (RenewSession/RenewSession2), gated close_session, plus auth_sessions_connect_axxon_profile/connect_axxon_profile/ensure_client and _write_gate matching the gated-module idiom. Approval env AXXON_AUTH_SESSIONS_APPROVE, token CONFIRM-auth-sessions. Output reports token_present boolean only; response.token_value is read into bool() but never emitted.

tools/tests/test_axxon_mcp_auth_sessions.py 10 passed. Gate/validation cases (env-off disabled, bad-token gap, empty creds error, bad variant error, renew bad variant error) each assert inst.client.calls == []. close_session source applies _write_gate before any wire call.

tools/axxon_mcp_server.py 6-edit wiring present: param auth_sessions (L70), conditional register (L221-222), register_auth_sessions_tools with 4 @server.tool entries (L1212-1231), --enable-auth-sessions flag (L1795), flag-gated instantiation (L2001-2005), pass to create_server (L2041). Module and server import OK.

raw/live-verify.txt (treated as evidence; live stand unreachable) shows Authenticate/Authenticate2/AuthenticateEx token_present True, RenewSession/RenewSession2 error_code 0 with token_present True, CloseSession applied OK on a throwaway session with the main session still usable afterward. Host sanitized to the demo-host placeholder, creds redacted, and no raw token values present.

python3.12 tools/axxon_corpus_restamp.py dry-run reports 0 method(s) restamped. api_methods.json: Authenticate/Authenticate2/AuthenticateEx/RenewSession/RenewSession2/CloseSession live_status tested-pass; ApproveAuthentication/DeclineAuthentication/AuthenticateBySecondFactor/AuthenticateWithPublicKey tested-warn-fixture-needed; no pending AuthenticationService rows (8/12). Coverage doc capability-vs-coverage-2026-06-05.md headline reads 251 tested-pass / 72 pending / 38 fixture-warn; recomputed global tally confirms 251/72/38 of 361; evidence.json coverage matches.
python3.12 -m pytest tools/tests/ -q = 902 passed. New module unit-test file present and green.

secret_scan: clean: no demo host IP, no plaintext credential patterns; token_value appears only as a module-source response field read into bool() and as descriptive text in task docs, never as an emitted raw token value
commands_run: python3.12 -c import axxon_mcp_auth_sessions, axxon_mcp_server -> import OK
rg secret scan over task dir + module -> only legitimate response field reads / doc text
